# Validation Eval Checklist: SPEC-023 - OCaml Language Support

**Purpose**: Validate that SPEC-023 validation/eval requirements are complete, clear, consistent, and measurable before implementation tasks are generated.
**Created**: 2026-07-05
**Feature**: [spec.md](../spec.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit-checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [x] CHK001 Are fixture-coverage requirements complete for required OCaml constructs, source/interface behavior, relationship categories, and negative ambiguity cases? [Completeness, Spec §FR-011, Quickstart §3, Contract §Validation Evidence Contract]
- [x] CHK002 Are parser-health and copied-artifact requirements complete for both `.ml` and `.mli` grammar artifacts before extractor acceptance? [Completeness, Spec §Clarifications, Research §Health-check parser artifacts, Data Model §OCaml Grammar Artifact]
- [x] CHK003 Are `codegraph status` requirements complete for OCaml language/status visibility in fixtures and all pinned real-repository smoke records? [Completeness, Spec §FR-002, Spec §SC-002, Quickstart §3-4]
- [x] CHK004 Are real-repository smoke requirements complete for the pinned small, medium, and large corpora: `ocaml-community/yojson`, `ocaml/ocaml-lsp`, and `ocaml/dune`? [Completeness, Spec §FR-012, Research §Validation corpus, Quickstart §4]
- [x] CHK005 Are compact smoke metric requirements complete for repository URL, commit SHA, index command, `filesByLanguage`, node count, edge count, parse warnings/errors, second-run stability, and retrieval probe outcome? [Completeness, Spec §Clarifications, Data Model §Validation Corpus, Quickstart §4]
- [x] CHK006 Are graph-stability requirements complete for repeated smoke runs, stable node/edge counts, explained deterministic variance, and no speculative unsupported relationships? [Completeness, Spec §FR-016, Spec §SC-002, Data Model §Validation Corpus]
- [x] CHK007 Are deterministic retrieval probe requirements complete for both `probe-explore` and `probe-node` evidence on all nine pinned structural questions? [Completeness, Spec §FR-013, Research §Nine retrieval questions, Quickstart §5]
- [x] CHK008 Are Yojson retrieval questions complete for the `from_string` parse path, `to_string` or pretty-print write path, and Safe/Common/Util `.ml`/`.mli` public exposure? [Completeness, Spec §Clarifications, Quickstart §5]
- [x] CHK009 Are OCaml-LSP retrieval questions complete for `textDocument/hover`, `textDocument/completion`, and Dune RPC diagnostics after build? [Completeness, Spec §Clarifications, Quickstart §5]
- [x] CHK010 Are Dune retrieval questions complete for `dune build` stanza-to-rule flow, `dune-project`/opam package metadata handling, and scheduler/action rule execution? [Completeness, Spec §Clarifications, Quickstart §5]
- [x] CHK011 Are headless A/B requirements complete for Yojson and OCaml-LSP evidence, and for Dune A/B evidence or an explicit follow-up gate? [Completeness, Spec §FR-013, Research §Yojson and OCaml-LSP headless A/B, Quickstart §6]
- [x] CHK012 Are existing-language control requirements complete for build, typecheck, unit tests, targeted extraction/resolution/status tests, CodeGraph self-repo retrieval smoke, and conditional existing-language A/B? [Completeness, Spec §FR-015, Research §Existing-language controls, Quickstart §7]
- [x] CHK013 Are full verification requirements complete enough to tie `npm run build`, `npm run typecheck`, `npm test`, copied WASM artifact assertions, and affected targeted tests to the PR evidence packet? [Completeness, Spec §SC-005, Plan §Testing, Quickstart §1, Spec §PR Review Packet Requirements]

## Requirement Clarity

- [x] CHK014 Is "compact smoke metrics" defined with objective fields and a clear interpretation of parse warnings/errors and retrieval probe outcome? [Clarity, Spec §Clarifications, Data Model §Validation Corpus, Quickstart §4]
- [x] CHK015 Is "useful graph-backed context" clarified with the repository-size explore budget and known-gap recording rather than subjective usefulness alone? [Clarity, Spec §SC-003, Plan §Performance Goals, Quickstart §5]
- [x] CHK016 Are "headless A/B evidence" requirements clarified with mode, run count per arm, model/effort settings, duration, Read/Grep counts, CodeGraph call counts, and interpretation? [Clarity, Data Model §A/B Evidence, Quickstart §6]
- [x] CHK017 Is the `codegraph status` evidence requirement specific enough to distinguish language/status visibility from general successful indexing? [Clarity, Spec §FR-002, Spec §SC-002, Contract §File Recognition and Status]
- [x] CHK018 Is the requirement clear that mandatory eval evidence belongs in the first PR/slice claiming complete OCaml support, while earlier split slices may omit it only when they explicitly do not claim complete support and preserve the completion gate? [Clarity, Spec §Clarifications, Plan §Implementation Slices, Research §Yojson and OCaml-LSP headless A/B]

## Requirement Consistency

- [x] CHK019 Do spec, plan, research, data model, contract, and quickstart agree that Yojson, OCaml-LSP, and Dune are the required smoke corpus? [Consistency, Spec §FR-012, Research §Validation corpus, Data Model §Validation Corpus, Quickstart §4]
- [x] CHK020 Do all artifacts consistently require deterministic probes for all nine questions while allowing only known gaps or blockers to be recorded explicitly? [Consistency, Spec §FR-013, Data Model §Retrieval Probe, Quickstart §5]
- [x] CHK021 Do all artifacts consistently require Yojson and OCaml-LSP A/B evidence before SPEC-023 completion while allowing only Dune A/B to split behind an explicit follow-up gate? [Consistency, Spec §SC-003, Research §Yojson and OCaml-LSP headless A/B, Contract §Validation Evidence Contract]
- [x] CHK022 Do validation requirements stay consistent with the fail-closed PPX/package policy and avoid turning unsupported generated behavior into a pass condition? [Consistency, Spec §FR-009, Spec §FR-014, Contract §Fail-Closed Behavior]
- [x] CHK023 Do existing-language controls align with the constitution's retrieval-performance regression bar and local-first build constraints? [Consistency, Constitution §VI, Constitution §VII, Spec §FR-015]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [x] CHK024 Can SC-002 be objectively measured from recorded smoke metrics for all three pinned corpora, including status output and repeated graph-count stability? [Acceptance Criteria, Spec §SC-002, Quickstart §4]
- [x] CHK025 Can SC-003 be objectively measured from the nine deterministic probe results plus Yojson and OCaml-LSP A/B records within the existing explore budget? [Acceptance Criteria, Spec §SC-003, Data Model §Retrieval Probe, Data Model §A/B Evidence]
- [x] CHK026 Can SC-005 be objectively measured from standard verification commands and copied-artifact assertions for both required OCaml WASMs? [Acceptance Criteria, Spec §SC-005, Contract §File Recognition and Status, Quickstart §1]
- [x] CHK027 Can SC-006 be objectively measured by mapping each validation/eval requirement to PR evidence or named deferred work without hiding missing evidence? [Acceptance Criteria, Spec §SC-006, Plan §Review Packet Source]

## Scenario Coverage

- [x] CHK028 Are exception scenarios defined for smoke repositories that index with parse warnings, graph-count variance, missing retrieval paths, or corpus-specific blockers? [Coverage, Spec §SC-002, Quickstart §4-5]
- [x] CHK029 Are split scenarios defined so Dune A/B and optional Irmin stress can defer only through explicit gates while required Yojson and OCaml-LSP evidence remains non-optional? [Coverage, Spec §FR-013, Research §Yojson and OCaml-LSP headless A/B, Quickstart §6]
- [x] CHK030 Are control-check scenarios defined for shared MCP, explore-budget, resolver, status, or retrieval changes that trigger existing-language A/B evidence? [Coverage, Spec §Clarifications, Research §Existing-language controls, Quickstart §7]

## Dependencies & Assumptions

- [x] CHK031 Are validation requirements grounded in existing repo harnesses and script names for `copy-assets`, `probe-explore`, `probe-node`, and `ab-new-vs-baseline.sh` rather than invented tooling? [Dependency, Package Scripts, Scripts §agent-eval, Quickstart §1, Quickstart §5-7]
- [x] CHK032 Are external corpus dependencies limited to pinned public repositories and exact commit SHAs in recorded evidence, without relying on network state during normal CodeGraph runtime behavior? [Dependency, Spec §Clarifications, Constitution §VII, Quickstart §4]
